nasb.text: The people said to me, “Will you not tell us what these things that you are doing mean for us?”

esv.text: And the people said to me, “Will you not tell us what these things mean for us, that you are acting thus?”

cnv.text: 眾人問我：“你不告訴我們你這樣行與我們有甚麼關係嗎？”

ccb.text: 百姓问我：“你可以告诉我们，你这样做跟我们有什么关系吗？”
